The Princess and the Frog (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $104,400,899Details
International Box Office $166,596,479
Worldwide Box Office $270,997,378
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $106,808,112
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,014,396
Total $117,822,508
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hardworking and ambitious, Tiana dreams of one day opening the finest restaurant in New Orleans. Her dream takes a slight detour when she meets Prince Naveen, who has been turned into an amphibian by evil Dr. Facilier. Mistaking her for a princess and hoping to break the spell, Naveen plants a kiss on poor Tiana — thereby turning her into a frog as well. The pair hop along on an adventure through the bayous to seek the help of a powerful voodoo priestess.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$786,190 (0.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$105,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2 opening theaters/3,475 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $165,023,124

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 25th, 2009 (Exclusive) by Walt Disney
December 11th, 2009 (Expands Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 31st, 2009 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 29th, 2010 (Wide) (Lithuania)
October 27th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
October 27th, 2022 (Limited) (Australia)
October 29th, 2022 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: March 16th, 2010 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 97 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: Curses, Food, Prince/Princess, Spoiled Child, Talking Animals
Social setting: Jazz
Subgenre: Family Adventure, Musical-Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Hand Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Walt Disney Animation Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Hardworking and ambitious, Tiana dreams of one day opening the finest restaurant in New Orleans. Her dream takes a slight detour when she meets Prince Naveen, who has been turned into an amphibian by evil Dr. Facilier. Mistaking her for a princess and hoping to break the spell, Naveen plants a kiss on poor Tiana — thereby turning her into a frog as well. The pair hop along on an adventure through the bayous to seek the help of a powerful voodoo priestess.
